steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage establishes two contrasting facts: Brâncuski “heavily influenced” both minimalist and abstract art movements, yet “produced relatively few pieces over his career” due to his exacting standards.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
B captures this disparity directly—his substantial historical importance to art stands in tension with his limited total output.

A and D reference artist themes and thematic diversity that the passage never meaningfully discusses, while C mistakes his general work and Bird in Space for a disparity when both are described similarly as simple and abstract.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
